query: SELECT id, title, theme, LEFT(squaresJson, 2000) as squares_preview FROM bingo_cards WHERE active = 'yes';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FRNjLS9FnCWG2G.0a443978a78d --database KbchydCPFi8EjNXDBYUsCi --execute SELECT id, title, theme, LEFT(squaresJson, 2000) as squares_preview FROM bingo_cards WHERE active = 'yes';
